mapper.sql: ID AS id, NAME AS name, BACKUP_MODE AS backupMode, BACKUP_STORAGE_LOCATION AS backupStorageLocation, DOMAIN_KEY AS domainKey, PUBLIC_CLOUD_ID AS publicCloudId, BACKUP_LOCATION AS backupLocation, BACKUP_TIME AS backupTime, BACKUP_SIZE AS backupSize, IS_LEAF AS isLeaf, DEFAULT_BACKUP_NAME AS defaultBackupName, HOST_ID AS hostId

TDB.ID, TDB.NAME, TDB.BACKUP_MODE, TDB.BACKUP_STORAGE_LOCATION, TDB.BACKUP_STORAGE_NAME, TDB.DOMAIN_KEY, TDB.DOMAIN_NAME, TDB.BACKUP_LOCATION, TDB.BACKUP_TIME, TDB.BACKUP_SIZE, TDB.IS_LEAF, TDB.DEFAULT_BACKUP_NAME, TDB.HOST_ID, TDB.HOST_IP, TDB.HOST_NAME, TDB.PARENT_ID, TDB.PUBLIC_CLOUD_ID, TPC.ID as PUBLIC_ID, TPC.NAME as BACKUP_NAME, TPC.DESCRIPTION, TPC.FLAG, TPC.URI, TPC.PROTOCAL, TPC.PORT, TPC.USER_NAME, TPC.OP_GROUP_ID, TPC.OP_GROUP_CODE
mapper.select: select TDB.ID, TDB.NAME, TDB.BACKUP_MODE, TDB.BACKUP_STORAGE_LOCATION, TDB.BACKUP_STORAGE_NAME, TDB.DOMAIN_KEY, TDB.DOMAIN_NAME, TDB.BACKUP_LOCATION, TDB.BACKUP_TIME, TDB.BACKUP_SIZE, TDB.IS_LEAF, TDB.DEFAULT_BACKUP_NAME, TDB.HOST_ID, TDB.HOST_IP, TDB.HOST_NAME, TDB.PARENT_ID, TDB.PUBLIC_CLOUD_ID, TPC.ID as PUBLIC_ID, TPC.NAME as BACKUP_NAME, TPC.DESCRIPTION, TPC.FLAG, TPC.URI, TPC.PROTOCAL, TPC.PORT, TPC.USER_NAME, TPC.OP_GROUP_ID, TPC.OP_GROUP_CODE from TBL_DOMAIN_BACKUP TDB left join TBL_PUBLIC_CLOUD TPC on TDB.PUBLIC_CLOUD_ID = TPC.ID where PARENT_ID = #{id}

select
from TBL_DOMAIN_BACKUP TDB left join TBL_PUBLIC_CLOUD TPC on TDB.PUBLIC_CLOUD_ID = TPC.ID
DOMAIN_KEY = #{map.domainKey} and IS_LEAF = 0

select
from TBL_DOMAIN_BACKUP TDB left join TBL_PUBLIC_CLOUD TPC on TDB.PUBLIC_CLOUD_ID = TPC.ID
DOMAIN_KEY = #{map.domainKey} and IS_LEAF = 0

select distinct on (TDB.BACKUP_STORAGE_LOCATION, TDB.HOST_ID) TDB.ID, TDB.NAME, TDB.BACKUP_MODE, TDB.BACKUP_STORAGE_LOCATION, TDB.BACKUP_STORAGE_NAME, TDB.DOMAIN_KEY, TDB.DOMAIN_NAME, TDB.BACKUP_LOCATION, TDB.BACKUP_TIME, TDB.BACKUP_SIZE, TDB.IS_LEAF, TDB.DEFAULT_BACKUP_NAME, TDB.HOST_ID, TDB.PARENT_ID, TDB.PUBLIC_CLOUD_ID, TPC.ID as PUBLIC_ID, TPC.NAME as BACKUP_NAME, TPC.DESCRIPTION, TPC.FLAG, TPC.URI, TPC.PROTOCAL, TPC.PORT, TPC.USER_NAME, TPC.OP_GROUP_ID, TPC.OP_GROUP_CODE from TBL_DOMAIN_BACKUP TDB left join TBL_PUBLIC_CLOUD TPC on TDB.PUBLIC_CLOUD_ID = TPC.ID
TDB.DOMAIN_KEY = #{domainKey} and TDB.ID IN (select max(ID) from TBL_DOMAIN_BACKUP where DOMAIN_KEY = #{domainKey} group by BACKUP_STORAGE_LOCATION , HOST_ID)
mapper.delete: delete from TBL_DOMAIN_BACKUP where ID = #{id} or PARENT_ID = #{id}
mapper.select:
select TDB.ID, TDB.NAME, TDB.BACKUP_MODE, TDB.BACKUP_STORAGE_LOCATION, TDB.DOMAIN_KEY, TDB.BACKUP_LOCATION, TDB.BACKUP_TIME, TDB.BACKUP_SIZE, TDB.IS_LEAF, TDB.DEFAULT_BACKUP_NAME, TDB.HOST_ID, TDB.PARENT_ID, TPC.ID AS PUBLIC_ID, TPC.NAME AS BACKUP_NAME, TPC.DESCRIPTION, TPC.FLAG, TPC.URI, TPC.PROTOCAL, TPC.PORT, TPC.USER_NAME, TPC.OP_GROUP_ID, TPC.OP_GROUP_CODE from TBL_DOMAIN_BACKUP TDB left join TBL_PUBLIC_CLOUD TPC on TDB.PUBLIC_CLOUD_ID = TPC.ID
and BACKUP_LOCATION = #{backupLocation}
